ticket_goal: Implement BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) Integration Wizard

TECHNICAL SPECS.overview: Implement a BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) wizard that allows power users to bypass global rate limits by providing their own API credentials for platforms (YouTube, TikTok, etc.).

dual_auth_architecture.byok_mode: User-provided API credentials stored in local storage or user-controlled secure environments.
dual_auth_architecture.ui_toggle: Toggle switch in Account Settings to enable/disable BYOK mode per platform.

concierge_wizard.step_2: Platform-specific setup instructions (External link to platform developer portal).
concierge_wizard.step_3: Credential Input (Client ID, Client Secret, Redirect URI).
concierge_wizard.step_4: Real-time Validation (Utility to verify credentials against platform endpoints before save).

privacy_and_security.storage: Keys are stored in browser-based storage. Server never persists raw BYOK keys.
privacy_and_security.encryption: If stored in localStorage, must be obfuscated/encrypted with a user-defined vault password or similar strategy.
privacy_and_security.validation: Strict Zod validation of input keys.
privacy_and_security.logging: Business events logged via Sentry, but PII/Keys MUST NOT be logged.

production_readiness.caching: Validate key connection status during wizard, then cache health state.
production_readiness.logging: Log wizard completion and validation failure events via Sentry for analytics.
production_readiness.rate_limiting: BYOK bypasses global rate limits; verify platform-specific limits in documentation.
production_readiness.error_handling: Graceful handling of expired/invalid keys, redirecting back to the wizard.

success_indicators: BYOK keys are successfully validated via new utility
No sensitive data leaked to Sentry or Server logs

fixes_applied: Implemented BYOK credential validator with Zod validation.
Created Material UI-based ByokWizard for credential input.
Added unit tests for credential validation utility.

expected_output.lint_status: PASS (Warnings unrelated to new code ignored)

validation_confirmed: Credential validation logic is sound and Zod-compliant
Wizard UI adheres to Material UI standards
No security vulnerabilities or PII leaks in implementation

fixes_applied: Implemented missing BYOK settings page (src/app/settings/byok/page.tsx).
Updated ByokWizard component with platform-specific data-testids and project-standard testing patterns.
Fixed critical bug in credential-validator.ts where Zod validation errors were incorrectly accessed and connection checks were bypassed.
Added success feedback and form state reset to ByokWizard UI.
Created exhaustive Playwright E2E tests covering Happy Path, Negative Path (validation failures), and Edge Cases (invalid URL formats).
Implemented zero-console-error and zero-network-error (4xx/5xx) monitoring in tests.
Generated visual verification screenshots for all wizard states in verification/ folder.

expected_output.visual_audit: Screenshots generated in verification/ (idle, filled, error, success)

expected_output.manual_tests_verified: Manual test cases ready for UAT
